global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial overhead shot of a single printed HVAC quote document lying flat on a clean dark walnut wood surface. The document is the only subject, dominating the central 60% of the frame. The quote is printed letterhead-style with a modest header reading 'AC INSTALL ESTIMATE' at the top. Below the header, a clean 4-line itemized list with line items only (no specific dollar amounts visible — fields read 'Trane AC System', 'Installation Labor', 'Permits', 'Material'). At the bottom of the document, a 'TOTAL' row exists but the dollar amount is also generic. The document looks legitimate and professional. ACROSS the entire document, slammed at a steep diagonal angle, a HUGE bright red ink stamp impression dominates the visual: 'EMERGENCY SURCHARGE +$5,000' in bold ink-impression-style typography. The stamp ink is slightly uneven, slightly bleeding at edges, like a real rubber-stamp impression. The stamp obliterates the quiet professional document — the price hike is visible and visceral. Single theatrical top-light, deep shadow falloff to near-black at edges of the frame. Mood: cold bureaucratic damnation, the moment a routine quote becomes an emergency premium. Editorial document still life, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon.

lighting.quality: theatrical, dramatic falloff to dark, document brightly lit, edges fall to black

composition.framing: near-overhead document shot, slight 3/4 tilt, document dominates 60% of frame
